html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

BombedGeneric

Pearl's Hot Spring is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the decoration score reaches 60 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 50 points. It can only be built within the Crabby Hermit's area.

Bath Bombs can be thrown into the Hot Spring, causing it to emit light and heat. The Hot Spring can only be soaked in after a Bath Bomb has been thrown into it. While soaking, the player gains Wetness while restoring Health and Sanity at a rate of 2 per second. The heat from the Hot Spring prevents Freezing in Winter, but can cause Overheating during Summer. Any items equipped in the hand or body slots will be removed and dropped nearby when entering the Hot Spring. Multiple players may soak in the Hot Spring together, even the Crabby Hermit.

The water in Hot Spring can be used to fill Watering Can and Waterfowl Can.

Contents

  • 1 Dry Hot Spring
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Dry Hot Spring

If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, the Hot Spring at the original location will turn into a Dry Hot Spring and can no longer be used. If Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Hot Spring will refill with water and become usable again.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Event skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.

BombedGeneric
“The perfect formula for relaxing.”
–Wilson
“Looks nice and hot!”
–Willow
“Oooh, is good for tired muscles!”
–Wolfgang
“Perhaps it will soothe my soul, if only for a moment.”
–Wendy
“STILL NO”
–WX-78
“This will do nicely.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks comfy.”
–Woodie
“Hm. Quite nice, actually.”
–Maxwell
“'Twill reinvigörate any weary warriör.'”
–Wigfrid
“We promise not to splash! Maybe.”
–Webber
“Perfection!”
–Warly
“Warm! Nice!”
–Wormwood
“Okay, that's pretty hard to resist.”
–Winona
“The effect of a good soak is no joke!”
–Wortox
“My turn!”
–Wurt
“Nothing like a soak at the end of a long day!”
–Walter
“There's a time to slow down and enjoy the little things.”
–Wanda
“If only I could soak my weary bones.”
–Wilson
“So toasty and warm!”
–Willow
“Is hot puddle.”
–Wolfgang
“When I gaze upon my reflection, a ghost stares back at me.”
–Wendy
“IT IS A HATEFUL THING”
–WX-78
“My old feet could use a good soak.”
–Wickerbottom
“Careful Lucy, wouldn't want you to rust.”
–Woodie
“I miss a good long bath.”
–Maxwell
“Perhaps a fire giant slumbers beneath!”
–Wigfrid
“Splish splash.”
–Webber
“Ah, if only I had time for a nice soak.”
–Warly
“Pool party!”
–Wormwood
“It's a nice, warm spring.”
–Winona
“I don't want to get my fur wet.”
–Wortox
“Swimming hole!”
–Wurt
“This would make a great swimming hole! It's even heated!”
–Walter
“It looks so warm and inviting.”
–Wanda
Pearl's Hot Spring is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the decoration score reaches 60 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 50 points. It can only be built within the Crabby Hermit's area.
Bath Bombs can be thrown into the Hot Spring, causing it to emit light and heat. The Hot Spring can only be soaked in after a Bath Bomb has been thrown into it. While soaking, the player gains Wetness while restoring Health and Sanity at a rate of 2 per second. The heat from the Hot Spring prevents Freezing in Winter, but can cause Overheating during Summer. Any items equipped in the hand or body slots will be removed and dropped nearby when entering the Hot Spring. Multiple players may soak in the Hot Spring together, even the Crabby Hermit.
The water in Hot Spring can be used to fill Watering Can and Waterfowl Can.

Dry Hot Spring
Structure Info

Source

Miscellaneous
"hermithotspring_abandoned"
“Where's the water?”
–Wilson
“What's better than a hotspring? A fire pit!”
–Willow
“Is just dirt hole now.”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing left for me here...”
–Wendy
“IT IS MUCH BETTER LIKE THIS”
–WX-78
“The spring has dried up.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's no good to me like that.”
–Woodie
“It's of no use to me like this.”
–Maxwell
“Ödd, I dö nöt see the fire giant...”
–Wigfrid
“Aw, it's all dried up.”
–Webber
“An empty basin.”
–Warly
“Muddy”
–Wormwood
“Dry as a bone.”
–Winona
“Oh me, oh my, the spring's run dry.”
–Wortox
“Nothing here!”
–Wurt
“It's just a hole in the ground now.”
–Walter
“No sense standing around an empty hole.”
–Wanda
If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, the Hot Spring at the original location will turn into a Dry Hot Spring and can no longer be used. If Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Hot Spring will refill with water and become usable again.
